title: SiTime Q4 2024 Earnings Call - FY2024 Revenue 41% Growth
text: SiTime reported Q4 2024 earnings with full-year 2024 revenue of $202.7 million, up 41% from FY 2023. The company posted a loss of $4.05 per share for the year, though revenue beat analyst estimates by 2.0%. Management emphasized the company's positioning in AI data center markets as a key growth driver for 2025 and beyond. The Renesas timing business acquisition, expected to close imminently, would add $300 million in revenue run rate with 70% gross margins. The company's long-term financial targets of 25%-30% annual revenue growth, 65% gross margins, and 30% operating margins reflect confidence in sustained growth from AI infrastructure demand.
